title: freibergergarcia/phone-a-friend
summary: CLI relay for Claude Code and OpenCode. Delegate to Claude, Codex, Gemini, Ollama, or OpenCode with streaming, sessions, and multi-agent teams.

title: tosin2013/helmdeck
summary: A self-hosted, containerized platform for AI agents, exposed as Capability Packs — schema-validated, one-shot JSON tools — and native MCP. The defining metric is ≥90% pack success on 7B–30B-class open-weight models, something no frontier-targeting competitor is optimizing for.

title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: RahbariAhmadreza/local-rag-sandbox
summary: A local, offline-first RAG sandbox for asking grounded questions over your own documents using Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma.

title: moonlight58/sagittarius
summary: FR: Un assistant privé, indépendant du modèle, pour le travail que vous effectuez chaque jour. Exécutez vos propres modèles. Maîtrisez votre contexte EN: A private, model-agnostic assistant for the work you do evert day. Run your own models. Own your context.

title: alperhankendi/local-coding-llm
summary: Reproducible scripts and tests for running a local coding LLM on Windows with NVIDIA GPU, served by Ollama and consumed by Cline in VSCode.

title: alvarogonjim/fova
summary: Design proteins in your terminal. A TUI agent for de novo protein design — free by default.

title: Bo1202/Aivy-OS
summary: Your own digital life form — local AI companion with persistent memory, IDE workspace, MCP support, and 30+ tools. Companion-first alternative to Hermes Agent / OpenClaw / Claude Code.

title: stevedores-org/oxidizedRAG
summary: A fast, modular Rust implementation of GraphRAG (graph-based retrieval-augmented generation) — runs natively, in a server, on the CLI, and in the browser via WASM.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: CommitBrief/commitbrief
summary: Local LLM code review CLI for git diffs. Review staged changes, commits, branches, or PRs in your terminal.

title: Andyyyy64/whichllm
summary: Find the local LLM that actually runs and performs best on your hardware. Ranked by real, recency-aware benchmarks, not parameter count. One command, run it instantly.

title: gil-son/language-ai-engineering-lab
summary: Language AI Engineering Lab, a place where you can deeply understand and build modern Language AI systems, from fundamentals to production.

title: AmrasElessar/d-terminal
summary: Agent-aware Windows terminal — multi-shell, AI-native, specialized panes in one window. Tauri v2 + Vue 3 + Rust.

title: Unravl/Hyvemind
summary: Tasks for planning - enhanced with Hiveminds for multi-model reviews, Swarms for long running autonomous tasks. Nurse to keep things running!

title: VyomKulshrestha/Heliox-OS
summary: An open-source, privacy-first AI System Control Agent (JARVIS-like) using voice and hand gestures

title: runyourempire/4DA
summary: Privacy-first developer intelligence — surfaces what matters from the noise

title: brandonkindred/Khala-Agentic-AI-Teams
summary: Many Agents, one objective... yours

title: manor-os/minutes
summary: Meeting notes for solo founders. Record Zoom, phone, or in-person. Self-hosted, MIT. First module of Manor AI.

title: Ipsack587/OllamaHarness
summary: Run local LLMs with a browser-based agent harness featuring file system access, shell execution, and development tools for autonomous coding tasks.
